positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric portrait of a smiling forest creature, perhaps a fox or a stylized woodland animal. The composition should feature the creature centrally, looking directly at the viewer. Use a bold, flat vector illustration style with thick, clean outlines and limited, earthy color palette (mustard yellow, sage green, deep indigo, terracotta). The background should be negative space or a simple, abstract pattern of interlocking shapes. Focus on strong silhouette, high contrast, and scalable art suitable for apparel. Aspect ratio 1:1. Bauhaus influence meets modern nature print.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, messy, low detail, photorealistic, 3d rendering
